payload.label: lamp
payload.long_description: Close-up view of a white, layered petal-like lampshade composed of overlapping thin fabric or paper panels with soft curved edges and a slightly translucent, high-key surface; the object is partially edge-cropped in the frame and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).
